title: Young Girls of Vienna
writer: Willi Forst, Franz Gribitz, Erich Meder
actors: Willi Forst, Anton Edthofer, Judith Holzmeister
plot: Carl Michael Ziehrer is a young composer who tries to make his way in a Strauss devoted Vienna. When his first opportunity arrives he is encouraged by Mitzi and two of her sisters. He in turn presents them with a waltz, "Wiener Mä...
